question: How long had I been watching stand-up comedy specials regularly when I attended the open mic night at the local comedy club?

judge_response.label: CORRECT
judge_response.reasoning: The context states the user has been watching stand-up for about three months and attended an open mic last month, which means at the time of the open mic they had been watching for approximately 2 months, matching the gold answer.
